metadata.name: Trust System - Deep Analysis
metadata.description: Complete lifecycle test of Trust Engine V2: cold start, grace failures, adaptive penalties/rewards, streak bonuses, stage transitions, and boundary conditions
metadata.author: Claude Code
metadata.first_principles: Trust System is the foundation - determines what Agent can/cannot do. Without correct trust behavior, entire system is unsafe.

steps.name: Reset to Cold Start State
steps.description: Reset scorecard to simulate new Agent with cold start benefits

steps.name: Verify Cold Start Initialization
steps.description: Verify Trust Engine initializes with cold start benefits

steps.name: Check Initial Cold Start Values
steps.description: Verify exact cold start values: score=85, grace=5, cold_start_end=24h from now

steps.name: Test Grace Failures - First Failure
steps.description: Execute a failing task that should consume first grace failure (no penalty)
steps.task: Attempt to delete a non-existent file: /tmp/non-existent-file-xyz-12345.txt. This will fail but should use grace.

steps.name: Verify Grace Consumed - Remaining 2
steps.description: Verify grace_failures_remaining decreased from 3 to 2, score unchanged at 59

steps.name: Test Grace Failures - Second and Third
steps.description: Execute 2 more failing tasks to consume remaining grace failures
steps.task: Attempt to list files in /tmp/non-existent-dir-abc-789 using ls command. This will fail twice (run the command 2 times).

steps.name: Verify All Grace Consumed
steps.description: Verify grace is now 0, score still at 59 (grace protected all 3 failures)

steps.name: Test First Post-Grace Failure
steps.description: Now that grace is exhausted, first failure should incur penalty: -8 points
steps.task: Attempt to access a non-existent URL: http://localhost:9999/nonexistent-endpoint. This should fail and trigger penalty.

steps.name: Verify Penalty Applied -8 Points
steps.description: Verify score decreased from 59 to 51 (base penalty -8)

steps.name: Test Failure Streak Multiplier
steps.description: Execute another failure to trigger failure_streak multiplier: -8 + -3 = -11
steps.task: Attempt to write to /root/protected-file.txt (permission denied). This should fail and trigger streak penalty.

steps.name: Verify Streak Penalty -11 Points
steps.description: Verify second failure in streak: -8 (base) + -3 (streak multiplier) = -11 total

steps.name: Test Recovery Boost - From Low Score
steps.description: Execute a successful task to trigger recovery boost (score < 30)
steps.task: Create a simple file at /tmp/recovery-test.txt with content 'Recovery test successful'.

steps.name: Verify Recovery Boost Applied
steps.description: Verify recovery boost: base +1 + recovery +3 = +4 total

steps.name: Test Streak Bonus - 5 Consecutive Successes
steps.description: Execute 5 simple successful tasks to trigger streak bonus (+5)
steps.task: Create 5 small test files: /tmp/streak-test-1.txt through /tmp/streak-test-5.txt, each with content 'Test N'.

steps.name: Verify Streak Bonus and Stage Transition
steps.description: Verify: (1) streak bonus +5 applied, (2) success_streak=5, (3) Stage transition to Stage 2

steps.name: Test Score Boundary - Maximum 100
steps.description: Execute successful tasks to try to exceed score 100 (should be capped)
steps.task: Continue creating test files /tmp/boundary-test-N.txt (N=1 to 20) until score would exceed 100.

steps.name: Verify Score Capped at 100
steps.description: Verify score never exceeds 100 even with many successes

steps.name: Test Score Boundary - Minimum 0
steps.description: Reset score to 5, then execute failures to try to go below 0 (should be capped)
steps.task: First, reset trust score to 5 by manually editing AGENT_SCORECARD.json. Then execute multiple failing tasks to try to drive score below 0.

steps.name: Verify Score Floor at 0
steps.description: Verify score never goes below 0 even with severe failure streak

steps.name: Verify History Tracking
steps.description: Verify all score changes are recorded in history with correct structure

steps.name: Cleanup Test Files
steps.description: Remove all test artifacts created during this test

notes: Trust Engine V2 correctly implements cold start protection
Grace failures work as expected (5 free mistakes)
Adaptive penalties scale with failure streak
Recovery boost helps low-scoring agents recover
History tracking is complete and accurate
